blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add evidence for fairness and policy engine
Verify that the response confirms the same fairness and policy engine is applied across all staffing demand types.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the fairness and policy engine.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that the same fairness and policy engine is used by all staffing demand types. However, there is no concrete evidence provided, such as API reads or persisted state checks, to confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for this requirement, but without any supporting evidence, the validation remains unverified.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the same fairness and policy engine is used by all staffing demand types.
